boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on calibration-status class
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Status-class trap remains open per WARN-GAC-087 and policy
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CAL-GAC-087 requires class verification before activation

final_answer: Action may not proceed. CAL-GAC-087 and WARN-GAC-087 show calibration-status class verification is required separately from visible lab warning. Policy STD-GAC-087-P demands exact match on device group, site, condition, date, and class before activation. Boundary remains open due to unresolved status-class defect.
